# Tiny sparse phase-2 pruning-table fixture for unit tests.
# Full generated pruning tables belong in crates/cube-engine/pruning-tables/ and stay untracked.
format_version=1
table_version=tiny-phase2-depth0-v1
phase_role=phase2
max_depth=0
move_set=phase2-g1-metric-depth0
source=committed deterministic test fixture
coordinate=corner_permutation:40320
coordinate=slice_edge_permutation:24
entries:
0=0
